title: Mandala's GUI - Dark mode Curios API Compat
description: A simple texture pack adding the style of "Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" to the mod "Curios API"
body:
**👀What it is:**\
A simple texture pack adding the style of "Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" to the mod "Curios API"

**📜Credits:**\
[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) by [TheIllusiveC4](https://modrinth.com/user/TheIllusiveC4)\
[Mandala's GUI - Dark mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode) by [Cesar Zorak](https://modrinth.com/user/CesarZorak)

**❤️Support Me:**\
(This helps me putting more time into my projects, thanks in advance)\
